programmes.show_description: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning the 10,000 pound jackpot.
The Mature Cheddars: Warwick Davis hosts as a team of walking footballers tackle a series of Top 10 list questions, but can they beat the Tenable Tower and head home with the cash?

Stephen Mulhern hosts as Kev takes to the hot seat to face the Banker and opens the renowned red boxes to try to take home 100,000 pounds.
Battling it out are Bexley couple Charlie and Gina, husband and wife Trevor and Isabel from Wales, and married couple of 50 years Jim and Anne from Wiltshire. Hosted by Adil Ray.
Crossing words are sisters from London Nenna and Bavita, Milly and her dad Barry from Wakefield, and Mike and his mum Vicky from Cardiff. Hosted by Adil Ray.
